sentences.arabic: الْأَدَبُ الْعَرَبِيُّ مَلِيءٌ بِالْحِكَمِ وَالنَّصَائِحِ الْقَصِيرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Arapska književnost je puna mudrosti i kratkih savjeta.
sentences.translationEn: Arabic literature is full of wisdom and short advice.

sentences.translation: Mudraci su govorili: "Vrijeme je kao mač".
sentences.translationEn: Sages used to say: "Time is like a sword."

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الْجُمَلُ الْبَسِيطَةُ تَحْمِلُ مَعَانِيَ عَمِيقَةً جِدًّا.
sentences.translation: Ove jednostavne rečenice nose veoma duboka značenja.
sentences.translationEn: These simple sentences carry very deep meanings.

sentences.arabic: يَتَعَلَّمُ النَّاسُ كَيْفِيَّةَ التَّعَامُلِ مَعَ الْآخَرِينَ بِاحْتِرَامٍ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi uče kako se ophoditi prema drugima s poštovanjem.
sentences.translationEn: People learn how to deal with others with respect.

sentences.arabic: يَبْقَى الْأَدَبُ مَصْدَرًا لِلْإِلْهَامِ فِي حَيَاتِنَا الْيَوْمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Književnost ostaje izvor inspiracije u našem svakodnevnom životu.
sentences.translationEn: Literature remains a source of inspiration in our daily lives.
